artifact_note: Sanitized Pi spike reproduction record from createAgentSession with explicit tool allowlist. Menus, choice validation, and apply gating remain Python-owned; Pi exercised QA and propose_repair_options only.

content: Because #1423 needs an interactive repair session that can answer follow-up questions without losing finding and proposal context. A session backend must persist finding IDs, proposals, and user choices across conversational turns.
Finding F-001 failed the prompt-source-set check because no backend decision had been recorded for session persistence, tool control, UX control, and packaging.

Pi provides stronger session and QA primitives with built-in JSONL persistence and tool allowlisting, but adds Node >=22.19.0. Python TTY is simpler to package; Hybrid captures Pi when available with Python TTY fallback.
